executionClassification.gated: State-changing or disclosure-capable; exact authorization is required before the documented sink.
executionClassification.preview: Read-only as authored; mutation vocabulary is inert and describes a separately prohibited or review-routed effect.

scope.discoveredMarkdown: Tracked and nonignored untracked Markdown safety/preview markers plus recognized PowerShell, shell/native, and portal mutation grammar.
scope.clientBoundaries: State-changing or disclosure-capable Jira, memory, security-audit, and Hermes implementations outside Markdown fence discovery.
scope.limitation: Novel syntax and prose still require semantic review and grammar extension.

clientBoundaries.effect: Send one bounded advisory query to one validated private target and disclose its response locally.
clientBoundaries.authorization: Exact query SHA-256 plus target-digest phrase before credentials or SSH.

clientBoundaries.effect: Create one previously absent remote dashboard artifact.
clientBoundaries.authorization: Exact date plus resolved action SHA-256 phrase; structured input and no-clobber remote wrapper.

clientBoundaries.effect: Create one GUID-named local HTML copy from one stable selected remote artifact.
clientBoundaries.authorization: Exact local destination, source digest, full remote content SHA-256, and byte-count phrase.

clientBoundaries.effect: Launch one default browser for a locally verified HTML file.
clientBoundaries.authorization: Exact local destination plus verified download SHA-256 phrase after size/content read-back.

clientBoundaries.effect: Launch one default browser for one allowlisted HTTPS or loopback HTTP URL.
Checkpoint and replace the six-file memory target set.
clientBoundaries.authorization: Separate --force preview and exact normalized-directory, file-count, effect, and full plan SHA-256 phrase.

clientBoundaries.effect: Create one previously absent six-file memory target set.
clientBoundaries.authorization: Exact normalized-directory, file-count, effect, and full plan SHA-256 phrase.

clientBoundaries.effect: Post one internal comment to one normalized issue key.
clientBoundaries.authorization: Exact site, issue, INTERNAL visibility, and full payload SHA-256 phrase before credentials/network.

clientBoundaries.effect: Post one reporter-visible public comment to one normalized issue key.
clientBoundaries.authorization: Exact site, issue, PUBLIC visibility, and full payload SHA-256 phrase before credentials/network.

clientBoundaries.effect: Create one service request in one service desk and request type.
clientBoundaries.authorization: Exact site, desk, request type, and full payload SHA-256 phrase before credentials/network.

clientBoundaries.effect: Apply one transition to one issue after a repeated live preflight.
clientBoundaries.authorization: Exact issue key/immutable ID, current-state hash, transition ID/hash phrase; drift causes zero POST.

clientBoundaries.effect: Create one previously absent Markdown audit report.
clientBoundaries.authorization: Exact normalized target and full content SHA-256 phrase.
